proposal_allowed_reason: The FMS expansion gives the future composite operator but does not determine the PR230 source overlap.  Current source-only rows and taste-radial C_sx/C_xx chunks leave Res C_sH and orthogonal top couplings underdetermined.
remaining_positive_contract: same-ensemble C_ss/C_sH/C_HH pole rows with C_HH from the certified O_H
Gram purity Res(C_sH)^2 = Res(C_ss) Res(C_HH) with uncertainty control
or a physical-response bypass such as matched top/W/Z rows with strict g2/covariance/delta_perp
strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained PR230 closure
does not treat FMS expansion as source-overlap authority
does not treat C_sx/C_xx taste-radial rows as canonical C_sH/C_HH pole rows
does not set kappa_s, c2, or Z_match to one
does not use H_unit, yt_ward_identity, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, or u0
